content.title: Non-Authority Warning
content.body: This roadmap is a derived planning guide. Governing App Behavior specs remain the source of truth for what runtime must do.

content.title: Identity
content.body: Fields: roadmap_id, title, status, parent_roadmap, child_roadmaps, scope, behavior_package, last_updated.

content.title: Review Before Moving Forward
body: Each phase or meaningful subphase should populate `review_before_moving_forward` before moving on.
- standard_review: use the ordered review ladder from `agent/core-workflows.doc.json`.
- specific_review: active workstream docs, governing specs, source evidence, or local artifacts for this roadmap.
- stop_condition: what must be true before the next phase or subphase begins.

content.title: Ordered Steps
body: 1. Confirm App Behavior mission and behavior package boundary.
2. Identify current, desired, intended, governing, pending, and superseded behavior state.
3. Identify behavior-thread parent containers, relationship mappings, reusable defaults, and shared specs.
4. Record runtime drift, quality observations, and pending product decisions.
5. Confirm proof implications and downstream architecture/implementation readiness.
6. Ask the user to confirm high-level App Behavior closure before downstream planning treats it as ready.
